articles.title: LPL introduces impact subs for 2026 season
articles.description: The tournament also has also created a rule that each team will have to field an under-23 player in their XIs

articles.title: ICC approves red-to-pink ball change to reduce bad-light impact in Test cricket
articles.description: Both teams will have to agree to changing the ball from red to pink in case of bad light during a Test match

articles.title: Hetmyer 'reintegrated' into West Indies ODI squad with eye on 2027 World Cup
articles.description: Alzarri Joseph returns from injury while left-arm spinner Gudakesh Motie returns to the side

articles.title: Santner added to New Zealand Test squad to face England
articles.description: Spinning allrounder has completed recovery from shoulder injury, Foxcroft to return home

articles.title: Tendulkar's IPL reforms: no impact player, two-part powerplay, five overs for one bowler
articles.description: What's the best way to return some semblance of balance between bat and ball at the IPL? Sachin Tendulkar has a three-part solution

articles.title: McCullum refreshed and 'keen to finish job we started' with England
articles.description: Head coach wants "refinement" of Test approach after being backed by ECB following Ashes debacle

articles.title: Rishabh Pant steps down as LSG captain
articles.description: Decision taken after Lucknow Super Giants finished last in IPL 2026; they had finished seventh under his leadership in 2025

articles.title: Munisar replaces Brathwaite as West Indies name T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: The same squad will face Ireland and Pakistan in a tri-nation T20I series, which got underway on May 28

articles.title: West Indies to host Sri Lanka, New Zealand and Pakistan in 2026 home season
articles.description: West Indies will play Test matches against Sri Lanka and Pakistan in the home season

articles.title: Tim David suspended for first match of IPL 2027 after breaching code of conduct during RCB vs GT final
articles.description: Amid the celebrations, the Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) have one little bit of bad news to deal with, and that is a fine and suspension for their middle-order batter Tim David.

articles.title: ICC approves usage of Pink Ball in middle of red-ball Tests after Ahmedabad board meeting
articles.description: The ICC Board also approved a change to the window for the ICC Women’s Champions Trophy 2027, moving the tournament from June-July to 14–28 February 2027.
